name: Tomatoey Tabouli
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook barley according to package directions; set aside.
2. Drain the tomatoes well and reserve the liquid. Add enough water to the reserved liquid to measure 1 cup, then bring to a boil.
3. Mix together bulgur, boiling liquid, and salt and garlic. Cover for 30 minutes.
4. Add barley and remaining ingredients (oil, lemon juice, parsley, dried onions) to the bulgur mixture and refrigerate.
5. Serve with cucumber dressing.
